headline: Poppi Co-Founder Allison Ellsworth Signs with WME
summary: AUSTIN, July 22, 2026--Allison Ellsworth, co-founder of poppi and one of the most recognized names in consumer brand building, has signed with WME for representation across all areas including television, digital, speaking, brand partnerships, and film.
